briefdescription.para: Creates a new Layout implementation without a LayoutManager.

simplesect.para: An IntrusivePtr to the new LayoutImpl

briefdescription.para: Gets the layout manager from the LayoutManager object.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the layout manager, or nullptr if not set

briefdescription.para: Checks if this layout has a layout manager.

simplesect.para: True if a layout manager is set

briefdescription.para: Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.

parameterdescription.para: Available visual (scale-applied) width, or WRAP_CONTENT / MATCH_PARENT.
Available visual (scale-applied) height, or WRAP_CONTENT / MATCH_PARENT.

briefdescription.para: Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Called when focus is requested on this view via RequestFocus().

detaileddescription.para: The default implementation returns Self() if this view is focusable, enabled, and visible. Layout views should override this to delegate focus to a child (see LayoutImpl).

The view that should receive focus, or an empty handle if focus cannot be accepted
Iterates visible children calling RequestFocus() on each. Returns the first child that accepts focus. If no child accepts, falls back to ViewImpl::OnFocusRequested() (self).
A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference()

briefdescription.para: Stores a LayoutManager object on this Layout.

detaileddescription.para: Must be called in OnInitialize() of derived classes, not in constructors (Self() is not available during construction).

briefdescription.para: This is the internal implementation class for Layout.

detaileddescription.para: Layout extends View with a LayoutManager that defines the layout algorithm. The LayoutManager is stored in a trait slot (ReservedTraitId::LAYOUT_MANAGER), so there is no per-instance member variable overhead.

simplesect.para: LayoutManager for the layout algorithm interface
